plugins.name: tech-graph

plugins.name: html-effectiveness
plugins.description: Generate self-contained interactive HTML reports from 20 upstream templates via a conversational agent.

plugins.name: team-superpower
plugins.description: Coordination layer that runs the obra/superpowers skill chain across a Claude Code agent team — one /team-feature command takes an idea through brainstorming, plan, TDD implementation, review, and finish with at most 4 owner touchpoints.

plugins.description: Orchestrated validator for Claude Code plugins — validates skills, agents, commands, and hooks across every plugin under plugins/**.
